security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data may be manipulated during transmission.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not protect against vote data tampering during transmission.

assumptions: The communication channel between the user and the governance contract is insecure.
The actor can intercept and modify vote data before it reaches the contract.

mitigation.strategy: Implement secure communication channels (HTTPS, TLS) and data integrity checks.

description: An attacker may intercept and modify vote data before it is processed by the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: The system lacks mechanisms to verify the authenticity and non-repudiation of votes.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Votes are not cryptographically signed or otherwise authenticated.

assumptions: The governance contract does not record user identities with votes.
The actor can cast votes anonymously without any accountability mechanism.

mitigation.strategy: Implement mechanisms for vote authentication, such as digital signatures or zero-knowledge proofs.

description: An attacker may cast votes and deny their involvement in the voting process.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data may be leaked through insecure transmission or storage.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not protect against unauthorized access to vote data.

assumptions: Vote data is transmitted or stored insecurely.
An attacker can gain unauthorized access to the system's database or network traffic.

mitigation.strategy: Implement encryption and access control measures to protect vote data.

description: An attacker may gain access to sensitive vote data.
